title: Gravity Force
body:
Does thinking about your current Minecraft world bring you down? Is the weight of your world on your shoulders? Then Gravity Force is for you! Gravity Force is a mod designed to add block stability to your Minecraft worlds. It features a variety of stability types which will determine grip strength and how far out you can build. For example, building a bridge with Planks will require fewer supports than Stone blocks. This will add a new challenge to exploring and building to your game play. Not only does this affect building but it can affect blocks underneath you while traveling. Be careful on that ledge, the blocks might fall! Gravity Force aims to be a semi-realistic approach to gravity by checking surrounding blocks and stability types rather than a single column or row. This mod is also extremely detailed in that blocks can transition into another block while falling. For example, Stone Blocks will change into Cobblestone when affected by gravity. You can customize this via a datapack and create a fully unique system. Gravity Force also features a configurable option to pause gravity updates while loading a world to allow for smoother world generation. Blocks can also be set to slide causing them to fall until they reach a flat area or to slide when in contact with water aka Slippery When Wet. You will have so much fun with Gravity Force you won't want to put it down.
